creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
Hi Matthias,

On Tue, 26 Sep 2006 14:14:32 +0200 Matthias Fechner wrote:

> please try this patch:

Now the port builds. But something weird with package(s) deletion:
https://tinderbox.amd64.ipt.ru/tb/logs/6-bsam-exp/app_ldap-1.0.r6.log

While net/asterisk is fine alone:
https://tinderbox.amd64.ipt.ru/tb/logs/6-bsam-exp/asterisk-1.2.9.1_2.log

Can you investigate it?


WBR

Boris Samorodov (bsam)
